query: SELECT id, title, status, jsonb_array_length((analysis_results->'suggestions')::jsonb) as suggestion_count, (analysis_results->'suggestions'->0->>'frameTimestampSec') as first_frame_sec, (analysis_results->'suggestions'->0->>'frameTimestamp') as first_frame_ts FROM video_analyses ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3;
